channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [LANDMARC] Landmarc Leisure Corporation Authorizes Key Managerial Personnel for Material Disclosures
item.description:
Landmarc Leisure Corporation Ltd. has authorized severally Mr. Mahadevan Ramanathan Kavassery, Whole-time Director, and Ms. Jalmeen Kaur Kalsi, Company Secretary & Compliance Officer, to determine materiality of any event or information and make necessary disclosures to the Stock Exchange(s) under Regulation 30. This decision is in compliance with Regulation 30(5) of the Listing Regulations. The contact details of the authorized personnel and the disclosure of this information on the company's website are also provided.

  • Landmarc Leisure Corporation has authorized Mr. Mahadevan Ramanathan Kavassery and Ms. Jalmeen Kaur Kalsi for determining materiality and making disclosures
  • The authorization is in compliance with Regulation 30(5) of the Listing Regulations
  • Mr. Mahadevan Ramanathan Kavassery is a Whole-time Director
  • Ms. Jalmeen Kaur Kalsi is the Company Secretary & Compliance Officer
  • The company has disclosed this information on its website

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LANDMARC LEISURE CORPORATION LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [GANGAPA] Ganga Papers India Ltd: Change in Chairperson and Resignation of Independent Director
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Ganga Papers India Ltd has announced a change in Chairperson and the resignation of an Independent Director. Mr. Ramesh Kumar Chaudhary, the former Chairperson, will cease to hold the position due to pre-occupation and will continue as a Non-Executive & Non-Independent Director. The Board has approved the appointment of Mr. Manish Kumar as the new Chairperson. Additionally, Independent Director Mr. Ratan Kumar Singh has resigned due to health reasons.

  • Mr. Ramesh Kumar Chaudhary to cease being Chairperson and continue as Non-Executive & Non-Independent Director
  • Mr. Manish Kumar appointed as the new Chairperson
  • Mr. Ratan Kumar Singh resigns as Independent Director due to health reasons

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GANGA PAPERS INDIA LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [URJAGLOBA] Urja Global Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window Until After Q4 Results in 2026
item.description:
Urja Global Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for dealing in the company's shares. The closure will be effective from 1st April, 2026 until the end of 48 hours after the announcement/declaration of the company's Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended 31st March, 2026. This decision is in accordance with the company's Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report Trading by Designated Persons, framed under the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. All connected persons, designated persons, insiders, and their immediate relatives are advised not to trade in the company's shares during this period.

  • Trading window for Urja Global Ltd shares to close from 1st April, 2026
  • Closure due to company's Code of Conduct in line with SEBI regulations
  • Closure to last until 48 hours after Q4 results announcement in 2026
  • Connected persons, designated persons, insiders, and their immediate relatives advised not to trade during this period

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: URJA GLOBAL LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [TORNTPHARM] Torrent Pharma Launches Oral and Injectable Formulations of Semaglutide, Priced Affordably
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Torrent Pharmaceuticals has announced the launch of its Semaglutide brands - Sembolic and Semalix - in India, in both oral and injectable formulations. This launch expands the company’s presence in metabolic disorders such as type-2 diabetes and obesity. Torrent Pharma is the first Indian company to offer this treatment across oral and injectable formulations, giving healthcare professionals a holistic choice for treating patients. The GLP-1 (glucagon-like peptide-1) receptor agonists have been shown to be effective at decreasing haemoglobin A1c (HbA1c), promoting weight loss and reducing the risk of cardiovascular events.

  • Torrent Pharma launches oral and injectable formulations of Semaglutide in India
  • First Indian company to offer oral and injectable Semaglutide
  • Expands the company’s presence in metabolic disorders such as type-2 diabetes and obesity
  • GLP-1 receptor agonists effective at decreasing HbA1c, promoting weight loss and reducing cardiovascular risk
  • Torrent Pharma ranked 5th in the Indian Pharmaceuticals Market

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TORRENT PHARMACEUTICALS LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [MHSGRMS] Mahasagar Travels Ltd. Closes Trading Window Until After Q4 Results
item.description:
Mahasagar Travels Ltd. has announced that the trading window for dealing in securities of the company will be closed from Wednesday, 01st April, 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of audited standalone financial results for the last quarter and financial year ended on March 31, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for the declaration of audited financial results has not been announced yet.

  • Mahasagar Travels Ltd. has closed the trading window for securities dealing.
  • The trading window will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of Q4 and financial year results.
  • The closure is in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the company's code of conduct.
  • The date of the Board Meeting for the declaration of audited financial results is yet to be announced.
  • The announcement was made by Chirag L Sangatani, Company Secretary & Compliance Officer of Mahasagar Travels Ltd.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MAHASAGAR TRAVELS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [CRAFTSMAN] Craftsman Automation Ltd Faces Rs. 5.30 Crore Disallowance Order by Principal Commissioner of Income Tax, Coimbatore
item.description:
Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, Craftsman Automation Ltd. informs that the Principal Commissioner of Income Tax, Coimbatore (PCIT) has pronounced an order dated 20th March, 2026, under section 263 of the Income Tax Act, 1961, directing the Assessing Officer (AO) to disallow Rs. 5.30 Crore with respect to the returned income for the Assessment Year 2022-23. The Company believes that the disallowance is not sustainable and will be taking appropriate legal recourse. The Company does not foresee any material impact on financial or operational or other activities due to the order.

  • Principal Commissioner of Income Tax, Coimbatore (PCIT) pronounces order under section 263 of the Income Tax Act, 1961
  • Order directs Assessing Officer (AO) to disallow Rs. 5.30 Crore for Assessment Year 2022-23
  • Craftsman Automation Ltd. believes the disallowance is not sustainable
  • Company to take appropriate legal recourse against the order
  • No material impact on financial or operational or other activities foreseen by the Company

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Craftsman Automation Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [KERALAYUR] Kerala Ayurveda Ltd Allots 9,34,887 Equity Shares on Preferential Basis
item.description:
Kerala Ayurveda Limited has approved the allotment of 9,34,887 equity shares on a preferential basis. 6,30,000 shares will be allotted to Katra Holding Private Limited at a price of Rs. 327.99 per share, adjusting an existing unsecured loan of Rs. 20,66,33,700. 3,04,887 shares will be allotted to Mr. S.K. Arun Kumar and Mrs. Sangeetha Arunkumar for consideration other than cash, in accordance with the Companies Act, 2013. Ayurvedagram Heritage Wellness Centre Private Limited will become a wholly-owned subsidiary of the Company. The Equity Shares will be listed on BSE Limited.

  • Kerala Ayurveda Ltd allots 9,34,887 equity shares on preferential basis
  • 6,30,000 shares allotted to Katra Holding Private Limited at Rs. 327.99 per share
  • 3,04,887 shares allotted to Mr. S.K. Arun Kumar and Mrs. Sangeetha Arunkumar for consideration other than cash
  • Ayurvedagram Heritage Wellness Centre Private Limited to become a wholly-owned subsidiary of the Company
  • Equity Shares to be listed on BSE Limited

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KERALA AYURVEDA LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [GKSL] Gujarat Kidney and Super Speciality Ltd Pays Penalty Imposed by BSE and NSE for Non-Compliance
item.description:
Gujarat Kidney and Super Speciality Ltd, previously known as Vihaan Medicare Private Limited, has paid a penalty of Rs. 3,30,400 each to BSE and NSE for non-compliance with Regulation 33 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The penalty was imposed for the non-submission of financial results within the prescribed period.

  • Gujarat Kidney and Super Speciality Ltd pays penalty imposed by BSE and NSE
  • Penalty imposed for non-compliance with Regulation 33 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
  • Company pays penalty of Rs. 3,30,400 each to BSE and NSE
  • Penalty imposed for non-submission of financial results within the prescribed period

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Gujarat Kidney and Super Speciality Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [ADITYA] Director Resigns from Aditya Ispat Ltd: Mrs Usha Chachan Steps Down Citing Personal Reasons
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Aditya Ispat Ltd has announced the resignation of Mrs Usha Chachan from her position as a Director. The resignation was tendered via email dated 20th March 2026, citing personal reasons. The disclosure regarding this change is in accordance with the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Mrs Chachan has expressed her gratitude to the board members and the company's team for their support during her tenure.

  • Mrs Usha Chachan resigns from Aditya Ispat Ltd
  • Resignation tendered via email dated 20th March 2026
  • Resignation due to personal reasons
  • Disclosure made in accordance with SEBI regulations
  • Mrs Chachan expresses gratitude to the board and company's team

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ADITYA ISPAT LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [JMJFIN] JMJ Fintech Ltd. to Consider Proposal for Providing Corporate Loans
item.description:
JMJ Fintech Ltd. has announced a meeting of its Board of Directors on March 25, 2026. The agenda includes the consideration of a proposal to provide corporate loans to various entities, including Non-Banking Financial Companies (NBFCs), NGOs, and other eligible borrowers. The limits for these loans are to be fixed in the meeting. Any other matter with the permission of the Chair will also be discussed.

  • JMJ Fintech Ltd. Board Meeting scheduled on March 25, 2026
  • Proposal for providing corporate loans to various entities
  • Loans to be provided to NBFCs, NGOs, and other eligible borrowers
  • Limits for the loans to be fixed in the meeting
  • Other matters with the Chair's permission will be discussed

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JMJ Fintech Ltd | Category: Loan
